welcome.heading: Build professional CVs, right in your browser
welcome.description: CV Genius is a free, offline-first CV builder. Your data stays on your device — nothing is sent to any server.

features.export: Export to PDF, HTML, or JSON

create.heading: Create your first CV
create.description: Give your CV a name to get started. You can always rename it later.
create.name_required: Please enter a name for your CV

tips.heading: You're all set!
tips.description: Here are some tips to get you started:
tips.tip_shortcuts: Press {{shortcutKey}} anytime to see all keyboard shortcuts.
tips.tip_theme: Switch to the Theme panel to customize colors, fonts, and layout.
tips.tip_export: Use the export toolbar in the preview panel to download your CV.
tips.tip_autosave: Your work is auto-saved. Press {{saveKey}} to create a named snapshot.
